artifacts.title: Deal Desk Quote Review
artifacts.description: A quote approval workbook that models multi-line pricing, margin math, and approval flags without fragile cell-address code.
artifacts.developerHook: Generate nested pricing workbooks with typed formulas instead of manually stitching Excel coordinates.

preview.playgroundSummary: A quote review workbook with nested pricing lines, approval-safe formulas, and readable workbook output generated from the domain model.

artifacts.title: Executive Board Pack
artifacts.description: A polished leadership workbook that turns typed customer portfolio data into board-ready views and watchlists.
artifacts.developerHook: Compose polished multi-sheet stakeholder exports from one reusable typed schema layer.

preview.playgroundSummary: A board-facing workbook that turns typed portfolio data into executive summaries, watchlists, and regional rollups from one schema layer.

artifacts.title: Logical vs Physical Summary
artifacts.description: A compact workbook that makes logical rows, physical rows, and row-aware summary formulas visible in one place.
artifacts.developerHook: See exactly how sub-row expansion changes totals, averages, and per-row aggregate formulas.

preview.playgroundSummary: A compact artifact that makes sub-row expansion and row-aware summaries legible by showing logical rows and physical rows side by side.

artifacts.title: Native Excel Forecast Table
artifacts.description: A forecast workbook built as a real Excel table with structured refs, filter-aware totals, and familiar spreadsheet ergonomics.
artifacts.developerHook: Switch from styled ranges to real Excel tables without changing your mental model.

preview.playgroundSummary: A real Excel table with structured references, totals rows, auto filters, and table styles while keeping the same schema authoring model.

artifacts.title: Renewal Ops Workbook
artifacts.description: An editable renewal planning workbook with typed formulas, locked logic, validations, and workflow-safe inputs.
artifacts.developerHook: Generate Excel files that users can safely edit without breaking the logic layer.

preview.playgroundSummary: A workflow-safe workbook with unlocked inputs, validations, hidden formulas, and protection rules so end users can edit safely.

artifacts.title: Streaming Fulfillment Export
artifacts.description: A high-volume operational export that proves the same schema model scales cleanly from buffered demos to streaming production workloads.
artifacts.developerHook: Keep the same schema and authoring style when your export grows from hundreds to hundreds of thousands of rows.

preview.playgroundSummary: A high-volume export that keeps the same schema surface while switching to batch commits and bounded-memory workbook generation.

artifacts.title: Territory Performance Matrix
artifacts.description: A runtime-driven matrix that generates region columns from typed context while keeping formulas safe and readable.
artifacts.developerHook: Build runtime column layouts without giving up TypeScript safety.

preview.playgroundSummary: A runtime-driven regional matrix where dynamic columns still participate in typed formulas, totals, and Excel table output.
